105:   const normalized = input.replace(/\s+/g, '');
106:   if (typeof globalThis.atob === 'function') {
107:     const binary = globalThis.atob(normalized);
108:     const bytes = new Uint8Array(binary.length);
109:     for (let index = 0; index < binary.length; index += 1) {
110:       bytes[index] = binary.charCodeAt(index);
111:     }
112:     return bytes;
113:   }
114: 
115:   if (typeof Buffer !== 'undefined') {
116:     return new Uint8Array(Buffer.from(normalized, 'base64'));
117:   }
118: 
119:   throw new Error('No base64 decoder is available in this runtime');
120: }

155: async function detectPackageScripts(sandbox: SandboxClient): Promise<{ hasBuild: boolean; hasTest: boolean }> {
156:   const output = await runSandboxCommand(
157:     sandbox,
158:     `cd ${shellQuote(
159:       WORKSPACE_ROOT
160:     )} && python3 - <<'PY'\nimport json\nimport os\n\npath = 'package.json'\nif not os.path.exists(path):\n    print(json.dumps({'hasBuild': False, 'hasTest': False}))\n    raise SystemExit(0)\ntry:\n    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        payload = json.load(f)\nexcept Exception:\n    print(json.dumps({'hasBuild': False, 'hasTest': False}))\n    raise SystemExit(0)\nscripts = payload.get('scripts', {}) if isinstance(payload, dict) else {}\nprint(json.dumps({'hasBuild': bool(isinstance(scripts, dict) and scripts.get('build')), 'hasTest': bool(isinstance(scripts, dict) and scripts.get('test'))}))\nPY`
161:   );
162:   const parsed = JSON.parse(output) as { hasBuild?: boolean; hasTest?: boolean };
163:   return {
164:     hasBuild: Boolean(parsed.hasBuild),
165:     hasTest: Boolean(parsed.hasTest),
166:   };
167: }

169: async function createDeploymentBundle(
170:   sandbox: SandboxClient
171: ): Promise<{ bytes: Uint8Array; sha256: string; objectKeySuffix: string }> {
172:   const base64 = await runSandboxCommand(
173:     sandbox,
174:     `cd ${shellQuote(
175:       WORKSPACE_ROOT
176:     )} && tmp_stem=$(mktemp /tmp/nimbus-workspace-deploy.XXXXXX) && tmp_bundle="\${tmp_stem}.tar.gz" && tar -czf "$tmp_bundle" --exclude='.git' . && base64 "$tmp_bundle" && rm -f "$tmp_bundle" "$tmp_stem"`,
177:     { timeout: 8 * 60 * 1000 }
178:   );

181:   return {
182:     bytes,
183:     sha256: sha,
184:     objectKeySuffix: 'source.tar.gz',
185:   };

220: async function reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(
221:   env: Env,
222:   workspaceId: string,
223:   deploymentId: string
224: ): Promise<void> {
225:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
226:   if (!deployment) {
227:     return;
228:   }
229: 
230:   if (deployment.status === 'succeeded') {
231:     const hasSucceededEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
232:       env.DB,
233:       workspaceId,
234:       deploymentId,
235:       'deployment_succeeded'
236:     );
237:     if (!hasSucceededEvent) {
238:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
239:         workspaceId,
240:         deploymentId,
241:         eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
242:         payload: {
243:           deployedUrl: deployment.deployedUrl,
244:           sourceBundleKey: deployment.sourceBundleKey,
245:           sourceSnapshotSha256: deployment.sourceSnapshotSha256,
246:         },
247:       });
248:     }
249: 
250:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
251:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
252:       status: 'succeeded',
253:       deployedUrl: deployment.deployedUrl,
254:       deployedAt: deployment.finishedAt,
255:       errorCode: null,
256:       errorMessage: null,
257:     });
258:     return;
259:   }
260: 
261:   if (deployment.status === 'failed') {
262:     const hasFailedEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'deployment_failed');
263:     if (!hasFailedEvent) {
264:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
265:         workspaceId,
266:         deploymentId,
267:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
268:         payload: {
269:           code: deployment.error?.code ?? 'deployment_failed',
270:           message: deployment.error?.message ?? 'Deployment failed',
271:         },
272:       });
273:     }
274: 
275:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
276:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
277:       status: 'failed',
278:       errorCode: deployment.error?.code ?? null,
279:       errorMessage: deployment.error?.message ?? null,
280:     });
281:     return;
282:   }
283: 
284:   if (deployment.status === 'cancelled') {
285:     const hasCancelledEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
286:       env.DB,
287:       workspaceId,
288:       deploymentId,
289:       'deployment_cancelled'
290:     );
291:     if (!hasCancelledEvent) {
292:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
293:         workspaceId,
294:         deploymentId,
295:         eventType: 'deployment_cancelled',
296:         payload: { reason: 'cancel_requested' },
297:       });
298:     }
299: 
300:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
301:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
302:       status: 'cancelled',
303:       errorCode: null,
304:       errorMessage: null,
305:     });
306:   }
307: }

335: function isRunningDeploymentStale(startedAt: string | null): boolean {
336:   if (!startedAt) {
337:     return false;
338:   }
339: 
340:   const startedAtEpochMs = Date.parse(startedAt);
341:   if (!Number.isFinite(startedAtEpochMs)) {
342:     return false;
343:   }
344: 
345:   return Date.now() - startedAtEpochMs >= STALE_RUNNING_TIMEOUT_MS;
346: }

355: async function executeWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
356:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
357:   if (!deployment) {
358:     return;
359:   }
360:   const payload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
361:   if (!payload) {
362:     throw new PolicyError('deployment_not_found', 'Deployment payload no longer exists');
363:   }
364: 
365:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
366:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {
367:     throw new PolicyError('workspace_not_ready', 'Workspace is not ready for deployment');
368:   }
369: 
370:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, workspace.sandboxId);
371:   await ensureWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
372: 
373:   const provenance =
374:     payload.provenance && typeof payload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.provenance)
375:       ? (payload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
376:       : {};
377:   const taskId = typeof provenance.taskId === 'string' ? provenance.taskId : null;
378:   const operationId = typeof provenance.operationId === 'string' ? provenance.operationId : null;
379:   if (taskId) {
380:     const task = await getWorkspaceTask(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
381:     if (!task) {
382:       throw new PolicyError('invalid_provenance_task', 'Referenced taskId does not belong to workspace');
383:     }
384:   }
385:   if (operationId) {
386:     const operation = await getWorkspaceOperation(env.DB, workspaceId, operationId);
387:     if (!operation) {
388:       throw new PolicyError('invalid_provenance_operation', 'Referenced operationId does not belong to workspace');
389:     }
390:   }
391: 
392:   const validation =
393:     payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
394:       ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
395:       : {};
396:   const runBuildIfPresent = parseBoolean(validation.runBuildIfPresent, true);
397:   const runTestsIfPresent = parseBoolean(validation.runTestsIfPresent, true);
398:   const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(payload.rollbackOnFailure, true);
399: 
400:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
401:     workspaceId,
402:     deploymentId,
403:     eventType: 'deployment_started',
404:     payload: {
405:       provider: deployment.provider,
406:       attemptCount: deployment.attemptCount,
407:       runBuildIfPresent,
408:       runTestsIfPresent,
409:     },
410:   });
411: 
412:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
413: 
414:   const scripts = await detectPackageScripts(sandbox);
415:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
416: 
417:   if (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest) {
418:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
419:       workspaceId,
420:       deploymentId,
421:       eventType: 'validation_started',
422:       payload: { step: 'test' },
423:     });
424:     await runSandboxCommand(sandbox, `cd ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)} && npm run -s test`, { timeout: 10 * 60 * 1000 });
425:     await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
426:   }
427:   if (runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild) {
428:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
429:       workspaceId,
430:       deploymentId,
431:       eventType: 'validation_started',
432:       payload: { step: 'build' },
433:     });
434:     await runSandboxCommand(sandbox, `cd ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)} && npm run -s build`, { timeout: 10 * 60 * 1000 });
435:     await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
436:   }
437: 
438:   const { bytes, sha256, objectKeySuffix } = await createDeploymentBundle(sandbox);
439:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
440:   const bucket = env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ?? env.SOURCE_BUNDLES;
441:   if (!bucket) {
442:     throw new Error('No artifact bucket is configured for workspace deployment');
443:   }
444: 
445:   const sourceBundleKey = `workspaces/${workspaceId}/deployments/${deploymentId}/${objectKeySuffix}`;
446:   await bucket.put(sourceBundleKey, bytes, {
447:     httpMetadata: {
448:       contentType: 'application/gzip',
449:     },
450:     customMetadata: {
451:       workspace_id: workspaceId,
452:       deployment_id: deploymentId,
453:       source_snapshot_sha256: sha256,
454:     },
455:   });
456:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
457: 
458:   const deployBase = (env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_BASE_URL ?? 'https://deployments.nimbus.local').replace(/\/+$/, '');
459:   const deployedUrl = `${deployBase}/${workspaceId}/${deploymentId}`;
460:   const finishedAt = new Date().toISOString();
461: 
462:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'succeeded', {
463:     workspaceId,
464:     sourceSnapshotSha256: sha256,
465:     sourceBundleKey,
466:     deployedUrl,
467:     providerDeploymentId: deploymentId,
468:     result: {
469:       url: deployedUrl,
470:       artifact: {
471:         sourceBundleKey,
472:         sourceSnapshotSha256: sha256,
473:       },
474:       provenance: {
475:         workspaceId,
476:         taskId,
477:         operationId,
478:         trigger: typeof provenance.trigger === 'string' ? provenance.trigger : 'manual',
479:       },
480:       rollbackOnFailure,
481:     },
482:     errorCode: null,
483:     errorMessage: null,
484:     finishedAt,
485:   });
486: 
487:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
488:     workspaceId,
489:     deploymentId,
490:     eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
491:     payload: {
492:       deployedUrl,
493:       sourceBundleKey,
494:       sourceSnapshotSha256: sha256,
495:     },
496:   });
497: 
498:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
499:     deploymentId,
500:     status: 'succeeded',
501:     deployedUrl,
502:     deployedAt: finishedAt,
503:     errorCode: null,
504:     errorMessage: null,
505:   });
506: }

508: export async function processWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
509:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
510:   if (!claimed) {
511:     const existing = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
512:     if (existing && existing.status !== 'queued' && existing.status !== 'running') {
513:       try {
514:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
515:       } catch (reconcileError) {
516:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
517:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
518:         }
519:       }
520:       return;
521:     }
522: 
523:     if (existing?.status === 'queued' && existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
524:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
525:       return;
526:     }
527: 
528:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
529:       if (isRunningDeploymentStale(existing.startedAt)) {
530:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
531:           workspaceId,
532:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
533:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
534:         });
535:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
536:           workspaceId,
537:           deploymentId,
538:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
539:           payload: {
540:             code: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
541:             message: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
542:           },
543:         });
544:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
545:           deploymentId,
546:           status: 'failed',
547:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
548:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
549:         });
550:         return;
551:       }
552: 
553:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment is already running; defer redelivery');
554:     }
555:     return;
556:   }
557: 
558:   try {
559:     const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
560:     if (!flags.workspaceDeployEnabled) {
561:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
562:         workspaceId,
563:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
564:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
565:       });
566:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
567:         workspaceId,
568:         deploymentId,
569:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
570:         payload: { code: 'workspace_deploy_disabled', message: 'Workspace deploy is disabled' },
571:       });
572:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
573:         deploymentId,
574:         status: 'failed',
575:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
576:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
577:       });
578:       return;
579:     }
580: 
581:     await executeWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
582:   } catch (error) {
583:     const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
584:     if (deployment && deployment.status !== 'queued' && deployment.status !== 'running') {
585:       try {
586:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
587:       } catch (reconcileError) {
588:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
589:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
590:         }
591:       }
592:       return;
593:     }
594: 
595:     if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError || deployment?.cancelRequestedAt) {
596:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
597:       return;
598:     }
599: 
600:     if (error instanceof PolicyError) {
601:       const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
602:         (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
603:         true
604:       );
605:       const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
606: 
607:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
608:         workspaceId,
609:         errorCode: error.code,
610:         errorMessage: error.message,
611:         result: { rollback },
612:       });
613:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
614:         workspaceId,
615:         deploymentId,
616:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
617:         payload: { code: error.code, message: error.message, rollback },
618:       });
619:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
620:         deploymentId,
621:         status: 'failed',
622:         errorCode: error.code,
623:         errorMessage: error.message,
624:       });
625:       return;
626:     }
627: 
628:     const attemptCount = deployment?.attemptCount ?? 0;
629:     const maxRetries = deployment?.maxRetries ?? 0;
630:     if ((error instanceof QueueRetryError || isTransientFailure(error)) && attemptCount <= maxRetries) {
631:       const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
632:       if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
633:         await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
634:         return;
635:       }
636: 
637:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
638:         workspaceId,
639:         startedAt: null,
640:         finishedAt: null,
641:         errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
642:         errorMessage: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
643:       });
644:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
645:         workspaceId,
646:         deploymentId,
647:         eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
648:         payload: { attemptCount, maxRetries },
649:       });
650:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment transient failure; retry requested');
651:     }
652: 
653:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
654:     const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
655:       (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
656:       true
657:     );
658:     const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
659: 
660:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
661:       workspaceId,
662:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
663:       errorMessage: message,
664:       result: { rollback },
665:     });
666:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
667:       workspaceId,
668:       deploymentId,
669:       eventType: 'deployment_failed',
670:       payload: {
671:         code: 'deployment_failed',
672:         message,
673:         rollback,
674:       },
675:     });
676:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
677:       deploymentId,
678:       status: 'failed',
679:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
680:       errorMessage: message,
681:     });
682:   }
683: }

685: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(
686:   env: Env,
687:   workspaceId: string,
688:   deploymentId: string,
689:   maxCycles = 8
690: ): Promise<void> {
691:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
692:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
693:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
694:       return false;
695:     }
696: 
697:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
698:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
699:       return true;
700:     }
701: 
702:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
703:       return false;
704:     }
705: 
706:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
707:       workspaceId,
708:       startedAt: null,
709:       finishedAt: null,
710:       errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
711:       errorMessage: 'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
712:     });
713:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
714:       workspaceId,
715:       deploymentId,
716:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
717:       payload: { attemptCount: latest.attemptCount, maxRetries: latest.maxRetries, recoveredInline: true },
718:     });
719:     return true;
720:   }
721: 
722:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
723:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;
724:     try {
725:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);

741:         retryableErrorRaised = true;

parts.text:
Found one correctness issue in the deployment runner:

- **Medium – cancel requests can get “stuck” on orphaned running deployments**  
  In `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:528`, when `claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution` fails and the deployment is already `running`, the code always throws `QueueRetryError('...already running...')` unless it is stale.  
  If a user has already requested cancel (`cancelRequestedAt` is set) and the original runner is no longer making progress, this path never transitions to `cancelled` until the 30-minute stale timeout. In queue mode that means cancel can appear ineffective for a long time.
  - Suggested fix: in that `existing?.status === 'running'` branch, check `existing.cancelRequestedAt` first and call `markDeploymentCancelled(...)` (or similar guarded reconciliation) before deferring redelivery.

I couldn’t run the test suite in this environment because `npm` is broken here (`Cannot find module 'node:path'`), so this review is static-analysis only.
